name: playwright
description: Drive a local browser through MCP for page inspection, screenshots, and interaction testing.

interface.shortDescription: Drive a local browser through MCP.

mcpServers.name: Playwright Browser
permissions: Can click and type on pages

tools.name: browser_navigate
tools.title: Navigate
tools.description: Open a URL in the controlled browser.

tools.name: browser_snapshot
tools.title: Snapshot
tools.description: Read the current page accessibility snapshot.

tools.name: browser_click
tools.title: Click
tools.description: Click a visible element on the page.

installReview: The plugin launches a browser automation server as an external process.
Tool calls can interact with pages after the existing permission layer approves them.
